_comment: Beta intake form schema. Questions map to ICP fields from positioning-brief.md. Each candidate is scored against ICP (0-3 per field); top N scorers are admitted to closed beta.
title: Join the beta
description: We're inviting a small group of early users to help shape the product. Tell us a bit about yourself so we can pick the best fit.

questions.label: Work email
questions.validation: must be a real domain (not gmail/yahoo if B2B)

questions.label: What do you use today to solve this problem?
questions.scoring_hint: Free-form; classify into existing-tool / hand-rolled / nothing

questions.label: What made you sign up for the beta today?
questions.scoring_hint: Free-form; classify into pain-triggered / curiosity / referral / no-clear-trigger

questions.label: How do you imagine using this in your work?
questions.scoring_hint: Look for specificity; vague answers score low

questions.label: Willing to commit to a 15-min weekly check-in for the duration of the beta?
I understand the beta is not public; product details should be kept confidential.
How did you hear about us? (optional)
Anything else you'd like us to know? (optional)

post_submission.thank_you_message: Thanks for applying. We're reviewing applications weekly. You'll hear from us within 7 days whether you're in this cohort or on the waitlist.

_implementation_notes: Scoring happens manually (1-3 per field) by beta program owner; cohort fills with top N scorers.
Auto-reject for anti_icp_match (e.g. employee of named competitor).
Permission to use email + name + company in beta logo grid: separate consent at sign-up if applicable.
